channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 15 com severidade Alta
• 28 novas CVEs
• 4 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-46703 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.6
Resumo:
Boxlite is a sandbox service that allows users to create lightweight virtual machines (Boxes) and launch OCI containers within them to run untrusted code. Prior to version 0.9.0, Boxlite allows users to specify the OCI image used by containers in the sandbox. However, when processing tar entries in OCI images, Boxlite does not account for the possibility that entries may be symlinks pointing to absolute paths. An att...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46703
 
🚨 CVE-2026-45565 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
Roxy-WI is a web interface for managing Haproxy, Nginx, Apache and Keepalived servers. In versions 8.2.6.4 and prior, EscapedString (app/modules/roxywi/class_models.py:16-30) is the centralised Pydantic validator used on dozens of fields including SSH credential name, username, description, etc. Its if/elif/elif/else flow returns the metacharacter-stripped value without also enforcing the .. An attacker who appends a...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45565
 
📰 VCF Breakroom Chats Episode 89 – Governing the AI Private Cloud: Deep Dive into VCF 9.1 Infrastructure Placement Policies
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
VCF Breakroom Chats Episode 89 Welcome to the next episode of the VCF Breakroom Chats. Today, we are happy to present this vLog with Daniel Koeck, Product Management at Broadcom. In this episode, Daniel Koeck and Taka Uenishi discuss how VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1’s new Infrastructure Placement Policies strictly enforce VM placement based on …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/11/vcf-breakroom-chats-episode-89-governing-the-ai-private-cloud-deep-dive-into-vcf-9-1-infrastructure-placement-policies/
 
📰 Quantum computing, agentic AI, and the next infrastructure layer in financial services
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
As financial services firms adopt AI and explore quantum computing, vector search, observability, and security platforms are emerging as the contextual intelligence foundation for autonomous enterprise systems.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/quantum-computing-in-financial-services
 
📰 Deploying VMware Cloud Foundation Private AI Services: Navigating Supervisor Architectures With and Without NSX
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
To help businesses develop generative AI applications securely within their private data centers, VCF Private AI Services is built directly into VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF). This embedded suite of services abstracts away the complexity of AI infrastructure, providing an end-to-end platform that includes a Model Gallery, Model Runtime, Agent Builder, and Data Indexing capabilities for …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/11/deploying-vmware-cloud-foundation-private-ai-services-navigating-supervisor-architectures-with-and-without-nsx/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CVE-2026-10847 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
A local privilege escalation vulnerability exists in Check Point Identity Agent Full for Windows OS. An authenticated local user may be able to execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges due to improper handling of executable resolution during the log collection process. Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to gain elevated privileges on the affected Windows endpoint.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10847
 
🚨 ShinyHunters Exploits Oracle PeopleSoft Zero-Day (CVE-2026-35273) to Breach Universities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The ShinyHunters extortion crew exploited an unpatched flaw in Oracle PeopleSoft to break into enterprise systems, steal data, and demand payment to keep it private. Google's Mandiant attributes it to the group it tracks as UNC6240, and dates the activity between May 27 and June 9. Oracle did not publish its advisory until June 10, so the bug was a
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/shinyhunters-exploits-oracle-peoplesoft.html
 
🚨 Researchers release details, PoC for exploited Check Point VPN flaw (CVE-2026-50751) - Help Net Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-50751 associada a Check Point. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTFBXN09PQWxtZDc5Z211RUdyWHhfdTNfT1Z5Z1NPMWVDYkFfZlZhaWNoX0EySFh1VjhnVU9DUWctU3hIalBRT29Obkw5NUVEb0pyZ0pteHFIN01jRlBzVmR1dUJNTUxuUFY5ZlNnMHFHQUhEZHlaNWVJOTRR?oc=5
 
💣 CISA orders feds to patch actively exploited Ivanti flaw by Sunday
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) ordered government agencies to patch an actively exploited Ivanti Sentry flaw within three days, as mandated by the newly issued Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 26-04.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-gives-feds-3-days-to-patch-ivanti-flaw-exploited-in-attacks/
 
💣 Oracle mitigates PeopleSoft zero-day exploited in data theft attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo SentinelOne. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/oracle-mitigates-peoplesoft-zero-day-exploited-in-data-theft-attacks/
 
💣 New GreatXML Exploit Bypasses Windows BitLocker via Recovery Partition XML Files
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Security researcher Chaotic Eclipse (aka Nightmare-Eclipse and MSNightmare) has released a new Windows BitLocker bypass dubbed GreatXML, a day after they published an exploit for Microsoft Defender. "This was an accidental discovery, it took a total of 4 hours to find this," the researcher said in a post on Blogger. "If you ever attempted to use Windows Defender Offline Scan, you're
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/new-greatxml-exploit-bypasses-windows.html
 
📰 LangGraph Flaw Chain Exposes Self-Hosted AI Agents to Remote Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of three now-patched security flaws impacting LangGraph, including a critical vulnerability chain that could result in remote code execution. LangGraph is an open-source framework created by LangChain to build complex, stateful, and multi-agent artificial intelligence (AI) agentic applications. "An SQL injection in LangGraph's function could
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/langgraph-flaw-chain-exposes-self.html
 
📰 Authorities dismantle 'AudiA6' ransomware crypto-laundering service
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Law enforcement has dismantled the “AudiA6” cryptocurrency service allegedly used by ransomware actors and other cybercriminals to launder more than $380 million.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/legal/authorities-dismantle-audia6-ransomware-crypto-laundering-service/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8420-1: .NET vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that .NET did not properly handle link resolution before file access. A local attacker could use this issue to perform unauthorized file tampering and write arbitrary files outside of the intended extraction directory. (CVE-2026-45491) It was discovered that .NET did not properly handle deeply-nested MessagePack arrays. An attacker could use this to cause .NET to consume excessive resources, resulti...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8420-1
 
🚨 USN-8426-1: Linux kernel (Azure) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that the Linux kernel algif_aead module did not properly handle in-place cryptographic operations. A local attacker could use this to escalate privileges, or possibly escape a container. (CVE-2026-31431) It was discovered that the Linux kernel did not properly handle shared page fragments during socket buffer operations, collectively known as Dirty Frag. A logic flaw existed in the XFRM ESP-in-TCP s...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8426-1
 
🚨 USN-8423-1: lwIP vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that lwIP contained a buffer overflow in the EAP authentication handling code. An attacker could possibly use this issue to trigger a buffer overflow, resulting in arbitrary code execution or a denial of service. (CVE-2020-8597) It was discovered that lwIP incorrectly handled certain ICMPv6 or 6LoWPAN packets. An attacker could possibly use this issue to trigger a buffer overflow, resulting in infor...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8423-1
 
🚨 CVE-2026-2827 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.7
Resumo:
The Open User Map PRO plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'oum_location_notification' parameter in versions up to, and including, 1.4.31 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2827
 
💣 Attackers Can Exploit Microsoft Outlook and Word Flaws to Run Malicious Code - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxOaXZvU2gweEEzbFJJLUkwNHlzU3pjbWhtWm5ZZHBMRTlLa2YyUFJLdDg4azZVRHRfUGtBclNSNzBWOEtBR1h3am1Jd0dGUnlXTElqVUtwSWNxejlIS1BIeW5JcTRlTFRaSUU4ejltZFpwRnU2bUtQb0owT2ZkMVU1dENRaw?oc=5
 
📰 WordPress Sites Under Siege as 29,000 Attacks Target Unpatched Flaw, While Microsoft and Google Rush - AD HOC NEWS
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a WordPress, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizAFBVV95cUxNdmhOQ2hoaXQ0cUFnVFBlLUJVamdkZ2NxRnFITEgxOHdoZDFCbDZuUUVnaFZ4UnBqQVRQM005RFFQNE95UkRUdkpOYzlYbDJXaWxPRUJJb01HQjNYRy1tdnI5RmZsRGJER2dHSE96Zy1PR3lnY0trZ3VzOE9PLXZiQnVlRVFZTV9LZUFtWlN1aGJUaFNJOGVDcEgxZGZjZzMzSVpBQ2RfLVlWVXZMai1lT2RYQngyYkU2clI4Nk1FN3FVWVZIUVBNbTRTYTk?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft Teams for Android Vulnerability Allows Attackers to Disclose Sensitive Data - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 10/06/2026 até 12/06/2026.
